item.title: TBO Tek Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: TBO Tek Ltd, a player in the Tour and Travel Related Services sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-day moving average. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a possible deterioration in the stock’s trend and raising concerns about its long-term strength. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Gayatri Highways Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Gayatri Highways Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Transport Infrastructure sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Matrimony.com Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Matrimony.com Ltd, a player in the E-Retail/E-Commerce sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA, a classic technical indicator signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development, coupled with deteriorating fundamentals and weak price performance, suggests increasing downside risks for the stock in the near to medium term. Time: 18 minutes ago

item.title: Prime Securities Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Prime Securities Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, signalling a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Lahoti Overseas Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Lahoti Overseas Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, has recently formed a Death Cross as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed below the 200-DMA. This technical development is widely regarded as a bearish signal, indicating a potential deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term trend and signalling caution for investors amid weakening momentum. Time: 19 minutes ago

This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and raising concerns about the stock's medium to long-term outlook. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Timex Group India Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Timex Group India Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development suggests a deterioration in the stock’s short- to medium-term momentum, raising concerns about sustained weakness in the Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Infosys Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Infosys Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA, signalling a potential shift towards a bearish trend. This development highlights a deterioration in the stock’s medium-term momentum and raises concerns about sustained weakness in the coming months. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.description: Kanco Tea & Industries Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a sustained bearish trend, reflecting deteriorating momentum and long-term weakness in the stock’s price action. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Bearish Trend Ahead
item.description: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s momentum and raising concerns about its near to medium-term price trajectory. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Fusion Finance Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Fusion Finance Ltd has recently experienced a significant technical event known as the Golden Cross, where its 50-day moving average (DMA) has crossed above the 200-day moving average. This development is widely regarded by market analysts as a bullish signal, indicating a potential trend reversal and a shift towards long-term upward momentum for the stock. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Viram Suvarn Ltd Forms Golden Cross, Signalling Potential Bullish Breakout
item.description: Viram Suvarn Ltd has recently witnessed a significant technical development as its 50-day moving average (DMA) crossed above the 200-day moving average, forming a classic Golden Cross. This event is widely regarded by market analysts as a bullish signal, indicating a potential long-term trend reversal and a shift in momentum favouring upward price movement. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Rally as Small Caps Lead Market Gains; Utilities Sector Shines
item.description: Indian equity markets advanced on 5 March 2026, with the Sensex rising 1.14% to close at 80,015.90 and the Nifty gaining 1.17% to settle at 24,765.90. Broad-based buying was led by small caps and mid caps, while large caps traded largely flat. Sectoral trends were mixed, with utilities outperforming and IT lagging. Market breadth remained robust, supported by positive foreign institutional investor (FII) inflows amid stable global cues. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Network People Services Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.1030
item.description: Network People Services Technologies Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, recorded a new 52-week and all-time low of Rs.1030 on 5 Mar 2026, marking a significant price level amid a mixed market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Market Headwinds
item.description: Saatvik Green Energy Ltd, a player in the Other Electrical Equipment sector, has touched a 52-week low, closing at Rs 341.50 on 5 Mar 2026. This marks a significant price level for the stock, reflecting a period of subdued performance relative to broader market indices and sector peers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Doms Industries Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: Doms Industries Ltd has reached a new 52-week low, with its stock price falling to Rs 2,119, marking a significant decline amid a sustained downward trend over recent sessions. This development reflects ongoing pressures on the stock, which has underperformed both its sector and broader market indices over the past year. Time: 2 hours ago
